data.content: Added runtime dedupe guard for OpenRouter virtual-agent registration so advanced settings dropdowns cannot show duplicate model entries even if duplicate agent keys exist. Wired dedupe into actions dropdown, pools selectable agent assembly, and resolveOpenRouterAgents; added regression tests for listUniqueOpenRouterAgentKeys. Quality gates: lint (warnings only), tsc, unit tests passed; build passes under NODE_ENV=production (plain build fails in this environment due non-standard NODE_ENV).
